description_long: This is an adult male pedestrian with a slim build, standing upright and facing forward. He has spiky, medium-length hair and wears a face mask that covers his nose and mouth. His outfit consists of a short-sleeve t-shirt with a graphic design and flame motif at the bottom, paired with knee-length cargo shorts that have a pocket on the right side. He is wearing open-toed sandals and has no visible accessories or carried objects. The overall appearance is casual and modern, suitable for an urban environment.
description: A casually dressed adult male pedestrian with spiky hair, a face mask, graphic t-shirt, cargo shorts, and sandals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the spiky hair, face mask, graphic t-shirt with flame design, and both arms relaxed at the sides.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile of the face mask, the t-shirt's sleeve, and the cargo pocket on the shorts.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head, the t-shirt's flame motif wrapping around, and the shorts' fit.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the other profile, the arm's relaxed position, and the sandal's side.
attribute_clothing_type: casual short-sleeve t-shirt and knee-length cargo shorts with a face mask
